Gut Problems in Bangor? Here's the 30-Day Reset Protocol.

A clinically structured gut reset protocol to repair the microbiome and reduce inflammation. Clinical oversight by Dr. Felicia Stoler, DCN RDN. Serving Bangor.

Start Gut Protocol →
The Protocol — 30 Days
Clinical oversight by Dr. Felicia Stoler, DCN RDN FACSM. Every recommendation checked against 302,000 drug interaction pairs. NPI-verified practitioners available in Bangor and surrounding area.
Why Bangor
BLEU was built city-first. Bangor has its own health profile — its own stressors, its own cultural rhythms, its own practitioners. This protocol is calibrated for what living in Bangor actually does to the body.
Talk to ALVAI
ALVAI knows your full health profile. Tell it what's happening. It gives you one clear protocol — not a list of options. One action. Tonight.
Dr. Felicia Stoler
